name: Repo hygiene monitor
description: Watches your project for file changes and quietly logs hygiene problems — leftover debug output, commented-out blocks, ownerless TODOs, oversized files — into HYGIENE.md. Stays silent when everything is clean.
recommendedTrigger: fires on fs:changed (at most once per 15 min of activity)
limitations: Judgement-based review of changed files, not a linter replacement — pair it with your normal lint/CI rules. Runs at most about once per 15 minutes of file activity; changes saved during that quiet window are picked up with the next batch.
